name: Roasted Tomato Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 vegetable stock cube or liquid stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable stock cube or liquid stock in a pot.
2. Add the chopped garlic and onion to the pot.
3. Add the coarsely chopped potato and stir until covered with the stock.
4. Cook the potatoes until they are soft.
5. Add the roasted tomatoes and bring the mixture back to a boil.
6. Blend or process the soup until smooth.
7. Season with pepper to taste.
8. Serve hot, optionally garnished with sour cream or yoghurt and chopped parsley.
